summary: Testing iteration 32 - Verified VAPID push notification configuration and offline queue implementation. All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend IndexedDB and ServiceWorker initialization confirmed via console logs. Features tested: (1) VAPID keys properly configured in backend/.env and frontend/.env, (2) Push notification helper function send_push_notification with pywebpush, (3) /api/push/send-test endpoint working, (4) IndexedDB offline storage (offlineDB.js) with document storage and stamp queue, (5) Offline sync service (offlineSync.js) with auto-sync on reconnect, (6) OfflineIndicator component in App.js, (7) DocumentStampPage offline-aware stamping with queue operation when offline.

vapid_configuration: VAPID public key configured in frontend/.env - PASS
VAPID private key configured in backend/.env - PASS
pywebpush imported and used for sending notifications - PASS
push_notification_api: /api/push/send-test sends notification to subscribed devices - PASS
offline_storage: offlineDB.js exists with initDB, storeDocument, queueStampOperation, getPendingStampOperations, cacheStamp functions - PASS
offlineSync.js exists with OfflineSyncService class, syncAll, handleOnline/Offline handlers - PASS
OfflineIndicator.jsx component exists with online status and queue count display - PASS
IndexedDB initializes successfully on page load (console: 'IndexedDB initialized') - PASS
offline_document_queue: DocumentStampPage imports storeDocument, queueStampOperation, isOnline - PASS
DocumentStampPage checks online status before stamp operation - PASS
Offline stamp operation queues to IndexedDB instead of API call - PASS
Toast notification shows 'Document queued for stamping when online' - PASS
service_worker: sw.js accessible with push and fetch handlers - PASS
Service Worker registered successfully (console: 'Service Worker registered') - PASS
PWA manifest.json accessible with required fields - PASS
integration_flow: Full push subscribe -> status -> unsubscribe flow - PASS
App.js initializes PWA and IndexedDB on mount - PASS

vapid_push_notifications.description: VAPID keys properly generated and configured. send_push_notification helper uses pywebpush with VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY and VAPID_CLAIMS. /api/push/send-test sends test notification to all active subscriptions.

offline_document_storage.description: IndexedDB utility (offlineDB.js) provides complete offline storage with stores for documents, stamp_queue, cached_stamps, and settings. Functions include initDB, storeDocument, getDocument, queueStampOperation, getPendingStampOperations, updateStampOperation, cacheStamp.

offline_stamp_queue.description: DocumentStampPage checks isOnline() before stamping. If offline, stores document with storeDocument() and queues operation with queueStampOperation(). Shows toast with WifiOff icon.

offline_sync_service.description: OfflineSyncService class handles auto-sync when back online. Listens to online/offline events, syncs pending operations, handles retries with max 3 attempts, caches successful stamps.

offline_indicator_component.description: OfflineIndicator shows floating indicator with online/offline status and queue count. Hidden when online with empty queue. Shows sync button, queued documents list, and status badges.

critical_code_review_comments: VAPID keys are properly formatted (PEM format for private key, URL-safe base64 for public key)
Offline queue stores all necessary stamp parameters for successful sync
Auto-sync on reconnect is handled by OfflineSyncService.handleOnline()
OfflineIndicator hides when online with empty queue - good UX pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: VAPID push notification and offline queue features verified. VAPID keys in backend/.env and frontend/.env. Push notification flow: subscribe -> send-test -> unsubscribe working. Offline queue: DocumentStampPage queues to IndexedDB when offline, OfflineSyncService auto-syncs on reconnect. OfflineIndicator hidden when online with empty queue. All PWA features from iteration 31 still working.
console_logs_observed: IndexedDB initialized - Multiple instances as components initialize
